items.text: 好吧，我们来谈谈内容浏览器 All right, so let's talk about the content browser 以及如何让您的所有文件井井有条 and how to keep all your files organized 因为一旦我们开始制作越来越大的场景 because as soon as we start making bigger and bigger scenes 喜欢开放世界 like open worlds, 会变得非常复杂，非常非常快。 it can get really complicated really, really fast. 所以，先办正事、 So first things first, 我们项目中的一切都将存在 everything in our project is going to exist 内容文件夹下。 under a content folder. 因此，您创建的每个项目都是一样的。 So this is the same for every project that you create. 因此，底部的窗口就是内容浏览器。 So this bottom window is the content browser. 默认情况下，浏览器可能会弹出以下内容 By default, you might have this pop-up content browser 点击控制和空格、 by hitting control and space, 但你会经常用到它。 but you're going to use this constantly. 因此，一定要在布局中考虑到这一点。 So definitely dock this in your layout. 您也可以同时打开两个 You can also open two at the same time 进入内容浏览器 by going to content browser 您最多可以同时打开四个、 and you can open up to four at the same time, 如果你需要拖动东西，这可能会很好 which can be nice if you need to drag things 从不同的文件夹进入场景。 into your scene from different folders. 但你应该一直按的那个按钮是 But the single button you should be pressing all the time 是全部保存按钮。 is the save all button. 虚幻 A big difference between Unreal 和传统 3D 软件 and traditional 3D softwares 是场景中的每个对象都保存到自己的文件中、 is that every object in your scene is saved to its own file, 通常是其自己的.uasset 文件。 its own.uasset file usually. 因此，您需要确保每个文件 So you need to make sure every individual file 尽可能多地保存。 is being saved as often as possible. 虚幻世界肯定会崩溃的 Unreal is definitely going to crash at some point 而且可能是在你最意想不到的时候。 and probably when you least expect it. 因此，最好保存场景中的所有内容 So it's always good to save everything in your scene 尽可能经常 as often as possible. 但如果你不想提交某些文件、 But if there's certain files that you don't want to commit, 你可以直接取消选中这些单个文件、 you can just uncheck these single files, 但要保存你知道要保存的东西 but save what you know you want to keep 因为我保证虚幻游戏会让你崩溃。 because I guarantee Unreal is going to crash on you. 我们还有这个导入按钮 We also have this import button 在这里可以导入 FBX 文件和.obj 文件、 where you can import FBX files,.obj files, 或任何图像文件。 or any image files. 还值得了解的是 It's also worth knowing 无法导入.uasset 文件。 that you can't import.uasset files. 如果您有一个.uasset 文件 If you have a.uasset file 你想把它带入你的场景、 and you want to bring it into your scene, 只需将路径复制到内容文件夹即可。 just copy the path to your content folder. 切换到 Windows 资源管理器、 You swap over to your Windows Explorer, 只需在内容文件夹内导航 just navigate inside your content folder 并找个地方粘贴。 and find a place to paste it. 在这里您可以看到这个.uasset 文件 Here you can see this.uasset file 你将拥有完全相同的文件夹结构。 and you'll have the same exact folder structure. 只是，你看不到任何 uassets。 It's just, you won't be able to see any.uassets 当点击此导入按钮时。 when hitting this import button. 因此，请牢记这一点。 So keep that in mind. 最后，我们还有这个添加按钮。 And lastly, we have this add button. 弹出的菜单完全相同 This is the same exact menu that will pop up 如果你在内容浏览器内的任意位置点击右键，就会出现这个选项。 if you right click anywhere inside the content browser. 这就是在场景中创建新资产的方法、 And this is how you'll create new assets in your scene, 无论是材料还是等级。 whether it's a material or a level. 这可能很难驾驭。 This can be pretty hard to navigate. 因此，您也可以输入您要查找的任何内容。 So you can also type in whatever you're looking for. 比如你可以键入级别序列 Like you can type in level sequence 如果您想创建新的时间线。 if you want to create a new timeline. 或者在顶部有导入选项。 Or at the top here, you have options to import. 您可以添加功能或不同的内容包、 You can add features or different content pack, 其中最有用的是第一人称、 which the most useful are the first person, 第三人或车辆背包。 third person, or vehicle packs. 如果你去内容、 And if you go to content, 您还可以导入启动器内容、 you can also import starter content, 这将为您提供一些材料 which will give you some materials 和不同的粒子效应。 and different particle effects. 你想看到很多不同的例子 You want to see a lot of different examples 在虚幻中如何设置材质。 of how materials are set up in Unreal. 除此之外，我们还有 Quixel 桥菜单。 Beyond that, we also have our Quixel bridge menu. 因此，如果您点击添加 Quixel 内容、 So if you hit add Quixel content, 会弹出一座桥，您可以在桥上找到任何 Quixel 资产 it'll pop open bridge where you can find any Quixel assets 你想把它带入你的场景。 that you want to bring into your scene. 但现在，让我们来谈谈下一件最重要的事、 But now let's talk about the next most important thing, 这就是让您的内容浏览器井井有条。 which is keeping your content browser organized. 因此，内容浏览器的首要规则是： So the number one rule of the content browser, 你唯一要记住的是 the only thing you have to remember here 是我们想让内容浏览器井井有条、 is we want to keep our content browser organized, 为此，我们可以 and we can do that by making 可以搜索到所有东西的名称。 the names of everything searchable. 就像我说的，我们从内容文件夹开始、 So like I said, we start with our content folder, 然后在那之后 and then after that, 我们要在下面创建一个项目文件夹。 we want to create a project folder underneath that. 在这种情况下，我们就有了 UEVFX 101 项目。 So in this case, we have our UEVFX 101 project. 在这下面，我们要开始创建子文件夹、 Underneath that, we want to start creating our sub folders, 我喜欢简单的东西。 and I like to keep things simple. 因此，我为每个项目创建了三个文件夹、 So I just create three folders for every project, 首先是资产、关卡和序列。 and that starts with assets, levels, and sequences. 资产将存储所有几何体和材料、 Assets will store all of the geometry and materials, 我们最终会存储导入的资产 and we'll end up storing the assets that we import 或我们在引擎中创建的内容。 or what we create in the engine. 关卡是我们存储地图的地方 The levels are where we're going to store our maps 或我们的环境、 or our environments, 在序列下，我们将存储所有内容 and under sequences is where we'll store everything 用于动画，以及使用序列器和影片渲染队列时。 for animation and when using sequencer and movie render queue. 一旦开始导入 Quixel Megascans、 As soon as you start importing Quixel Megascans, 默认情况下会有一个 Megascans 文件夹、 there'll be a Megascans folder by default, 这样就进来了、 so that comes in, 以及 MS 下划线预设文件夹 as well as an MS underscore presets folder 在这里，它将存储所有的母版材料。 where it'll store all of the master materials. 因此，如果我们回到虚幻引擎、 So if we hop back into Unreal Engine, 我们可以清楚地看到我们的 UEVFX 101、 we can see exactly that we have our UEVFX 101, 我总是喜欢在这上面设置一个颜色。 and I like to always set a color on this. 这个是青绿色的、 This one's sort of a lime green, 但您可以右键单击并设置颜色 but you can just right click and set color 到真正引人注目的颜色，如红色或紫色 to something really noticeable like red or purple 或饱和度很高的颜色。 or just a very saturated color. 您可以从这里的下拉菜单中快速识别 You can quickly identify it in the dropdown here 或主菜单。 or from your main menu. 现在，我们有一些非常大的图标、 Right now we have some really large icons, 因此，如果我把光标放在内容浏览器内 so if I just place my cursor inside of the content browser 然后按下控制键、 and hit the control key, 我用鼠标滚轮向下滚动、 and I scroll down on my mouse wheel, 这样就能把这些东西变小很多。 it'll make these a lot smaller. 当我们有这些较小的图标时、 And when we have these smaller icons, 实际上，我们创建的所有内容都会有一个标签。 we'll actually get a label of everything that we create. 因此，如果我在这里导航，现在我们只有文件夹、 So if I navigate in here, right now we just have folders, 但你可以看到我们有蓝图、 but you can see we have blueprints, 我们有材料实例，我们有纹理、 we have material instances, we have textures, 这就很明显了 and this makes it really obvious 我们这里有哪些类型的资产。 what types of assets we have inside of here. 就像我之前说的 Now, like I said earlier, 我们组织浏览器内容的方式 the way we organize the content browser 就是让一切都可以搜索 is by making everything searchable 现在我们有了这个搜索栏。 now that we have this search bar that we have right here. 因此，文件夹结构并不重要 So that's why the folder structure doesn't matter 相当多。 quite as much. 我们的想法是从内容浏览器开始 The idea is we'll start at the content browser here 我们可以输入任何我们想要的单一资产。 and we could type in any single asset that we want. 就像我们知道这里有天花板一样、 Like we know we have ceiling tiles here, 以及所有相关资产 and now all of the related assets 会显示在材料下面、 are gonna show up underneath the materials, 静态网格和纹理。 the static meshes, and the textures. 我们之所以想用这种方式来命名所有的东西 And the reason why we wanna name everything in this way 这样，当我们在这里使用这些下拉菜单时、 is so that whenever we have these dropdowns here, 比方说，我想分配不同的材料 like let's say I wanna assign a different material 到我们这里来、 to our sphere here, 我可以点击这个下拉菜单 I could just click on this dropdown 现在所有这些相关材料 and now all of those relevant materials 会出现在彼此身边。 are gonna show up right next to one another. 因此，保持井井有条真的很容易。 So it's really easy to stay organized. 现在，你不必只搜索对象的名称了、 Now, you don't just have to search the name of objects, 还可以搜索对象类型。 you can also search type of object. 就像我们知道自己有水平一样。 Like we know we have levels. 如果我们键入水平、 If we type in levels, 我们可以看到，它还会搜索 we can see that it will also search 基于资产类型。 based on the asset type. 这里还有一个小下拉菜单 There's also this little dropdown here 在这里我们可以添加过滤器。 where we can add filters. 因此，我们可以通过关卡、纹理和静态网格进行筛选、 So we can filter by levels, textures, static meshes, 或材料，或下面的任何其他东西。 or materials, or anything else underneath. 但你在顶部看到的 But the ones you see at the top 是最常见的。 are going to be the most common. 让场景中的每个资产都能被搜索到的方法 And the way we can keep every asset in our scene searchable 就是遵循一个非常简单的命名规则 is by following a really simple naming convention 基于我们的资产类型。 based on our asset types. 因此，如果我们进口的是一堵砖墙、 So if we were importing a brick wall, 我们将创建这些类型的资产 these are the types of assets that we would create 基于那面砖墙。 based on that brick wall. 因此，我们很清楚我们需要搜索什么、 So we know exactly what we need to search, 然后所有相关数据都会出现在下面。 and then all of the relevant data comes underneath. 命名规则如下 And this is the naming convention 我发现这是最容易掌握的。 that I found is the easiest to follow. 我们只是用前缀来命名、 We're just naming it by prefix, 如演员类型。 as in the type of actor. 然后是资产名称、 Then the name of the asset, 简单描述 a simple descriptor to be specific 以防同一资产有不同的变体、 in case we have different variations of the same asset, 和末尾的数字。 and a number at the end. 同样，这也是保留我们所有资产的另一种方式 Again, just another way to keep all of our assets 分离和整理。 separated and organized. 前缀只是缩略语 The prefixes are just acronyms 不同类型的资产。 for the different asset types. 因此，我们可以有材料实例、 So we can have material instances, 我们可以用 SM 来表示静态网格、 we can have SM for static mesh, 我们可以用 SKM 来制作骨骼网格、 we could have SKM for a skeletal mesh, 这就是我们的角色、 which are our characters, 或者我们可以用英国石油公司来做蓝图。 or we could have BP for blueprint. 这一切都是基于虚幻引擎的 This is all based off of the Unreal Engine's 建议的资产命名约定。 recommended asset naming conventions. 完整列表 You can find a complete list 关于建议的资产命名规则 on the recommended asset naming conventions 文件页、 documentation page, 但你真的只需要了解高层的几个人、 but you really just have to know the few at the top, 是材料，是材料实例、 which are materials, material instances, 骨骼网格、静态网格、纹理和蓝图。 skeletal mesh, static mesh, textures, and blueprints. 所以，当我开始 So when I was getting started, 我会把它放在第二个显示器上 I would just keep this on a second monitor 然后点击 F and just hit Control F 如果还有什么我不确定的话。 if there was ever one I wasn't sure about. 但最终 But in the end, 你一次只能使用几个、 you're only using a couple of these at a time, 如果不完全匹配也没关系。 and it's fine if they don't match exactly. 你只想在整个项目中保持一致。 You just wanna be consistent across your entire project.
items.speaker: instructor
